name: Sif
description:
| God of War |

Sif (Old Norse: Sifjar, Norse: ᛋᛁᚠ), also known as Sif Mandifarisdóttir (Translation: Sif, Daughter of Mandifari) is the Norse Goddess of Wheat, Earth, Harvest and Family.

She is the widow of Thor, the daughter-in-law of Odin, step-mother of Magni and mother of Modi and Thrúd. Sif is introduced as a secondary character of God of War Ragnarök. A loving mother and faithful wife, Sif survives Ragnarök and becomes the new leader of the Aesir following the death of both Odin and Thor.
